Flayed Paebala Leggings  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: LEGS
AC: 15
INT: +6 HP: +20 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
SV DISEASE: +20
WT: 2.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Flayed Paebala Leggings
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: LEGS
AC: 15
INT: +6 HP: +20 MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
SV DISEASE: +20
WT: 2.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Paebala Skin Leggings
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Leather 1
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):20, 20, 20
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:39:32
Page Updated:Wed Nov 25th, 2020

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 53
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Dragon Necropolis
NPC Name
a Chetari Deathshaper
a Chetari Dominator
a Chetari Dustshaper
a Chetari Packrat
a Chetari seeker
Dominator Yisaki

Dragon Necropolis

Great Legs
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2002 at 12:01 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591783620967
6 posts
My 51 Necro got these off some random rat. They look great and have great stats!

Any class that can use would do well with these. Some of the listed classes should be able to get better by 50+, but even so they are great for those who haven't.

love it
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2002 at 1:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757922858
14 posts
I agree with MrG ... these are awesome for monks. I have a pair of these and the BP (when not wearing Fungi) on my monk.

Monks need AC and HPs .. plain and simple. I have 1189 AC with 2400 Hps right now base and looking for more!!!

I will replace these leggings when I get mah AoW leggings <drool> 2 raids and have not seen them yet :( waaa

Quadzilla

No way man
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 7:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250526844
2 posts
These are defenatley better than oiled greaves, as a 56 monk i can sure as hell live with 0.5 more wt for some pants that gives the same ac and hp as oiled greaves but add up on disease resist and additional stats... I was lucky enough to get these off some rats in DN, rare drop though but if u have the guild go for these drop the oiled greaves, sell the greaves and buy a dragonborn sash instead.

hello bro u see the 20 disease, this item is not gay, oiled greaves is gay if u compare these 2 items, the fact that u might find these gay are that they are no drop so u cant get them and twink your n00b monk with them, the fact is they are unique and look friggin nice on iksar monk also, even the human brothers too.

the more saves u can get the better, and 0.5 more wt is hell worth these.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 24 2001 at 5:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I know watcha mean...there should at least
RE: posting
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 1:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250513793
15 posts
bravo!
▲ Page top
In reply to malain.
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 10:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757581921
20 posts
Dex has nothing to do with block, dodge, or riposte, agi determines how often those come into effect. If i were you I would go for AC/Str/Agi/Resists/Sta/Dex In that order(Resists and Sta are kinda a tie). Str and Dex both affect your offensive skills learning curve, and agi affects your defensive skills learning curve. Seeing as how high a monks defensive skills can go agi is very important. Trust me over 2 years on EQ and lots and lots of research says so ;) Scratch one item from my rangers legs list, I know i can do better then this by the time I'm 53.
▲ Page top
RE: In reply to malain.
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 1:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252288507
1 post
Wrong. AGI has nothing to do with how often defensive skill go off. That is based off of skill level alone. AGI only helps the skills go up faster.

Pulling monks need AC/hps/STA/resists/AGI/STR/DEX. STR/AGI/DEX are not something I ever look for anyways. Good monk gear just kind of comes with it as a bonus.
▲ Page top
RE: In reply to malain.
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2003 at 9:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247140349
112 posts
AGI has nothing to do with how often defensive skill go off. That is based off of skill level alone. AGI only helps the skills go up faster.

True..those are skill based only......and im not speaking for Monks here...just Beast....AGI for a Beast is VERY Important...we are an AVOIDANCE class...we like Monks do NOT and never will mitigate damage even close to what Plate classes do.... so dream all you want about what you "think" 1200AC is going to do for you, but in reality 1200AC for a Monk/Beast has about the same effect as approx 900AC for a Warrior....
Id take 100AGI over 100AC anyday

and AGI does more than "ONLY" help your def skills go up....it adds a small visable AC boost, ie: every 100AGI is approx 20AC...but also its main effect is your AVOIDANCE 1/2 of your AC which is what governs the 'MISSES" from Mobs...
A beast or Monk with 1200AC will still get hammered by a Mob that hits for 250+....your best bet is for that Mob to MISS you completely.
I keep my AGI pegged at 265....
▲ Page top
This drops off...
QuoteReply
# May 21 2001 at 1:21 AM Rating: Decent

View User Forum
Anonymous
To Thewong:

Just about everything in DN will drop off the Rats. There is a seperate loot table for some of the bosses. But perty sure ive seen this drop off one of the rats. Just keep kill'n the bastages, and you should get one to drop.

To Everyone else:

Great monk item. If you aren't 55+ or haven't even seen the zone, please don't post about something you have no idea about or will never aquire. Thx.

57th wizard of Brell

QuoteReply
# May 15 2001 at 1:30 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Oiled greaves are better than these for monks, and to the enchanter that says monks dont need AC, may I please have what you are smoking. I suppose you think str is our main stat. Well in the post 50 world (which you obviously havent ever experienced) str makes little differance in your attack. Besides, what good is str when your not alive to do damage cause you skimped on the AC gear and frenzied a mob that hits 200+?
▲ Page top
Here's the scoop
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 5:22 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I had it explained to me by the guy that designed Necropolis. Sometimes is really cool to play on Test Server..;)

The Chetari are a necromancy based culture, the Paebala are opposing them.

The Chetari necros, when they capture a Paebala, sometimes perform a dark and evil ritual to create the Paebala skin armor. Since they, being necros, make the armor, they made sure they could wear it as well as give it out to their brethren of lesser classes.

The real deal, boiling down all the rp reasons, is that he wanted to avoid cookie cutter items when he could.

Look at some of the other toys coming out of Necropolis, some are kinda neat (like the serpent belt), some are different (like the goo), etc.

He said he actually got a bug report about the cowl of mortality that drops off Zlandicar, since it is all/all but has black chain texture. He did that on purpose.

People need to stop pigeonholing items, and think outside the box more.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 18 2000 at 4:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is CRAP IMO. Why Verant? Please say your top notch developers messed up once again! These should be for all the casting classes. Warriors don't need these and why should Necro's get itmes like this and not all the other casters FIX THESE.
Flayed

Pretty sweet, a monk with a little extra weight carrying ability could use these very well. Check it out, 15 ac and only 2 weight. Nice. This would of course be more godlike for sk or necro because of the int and mana though.

Thank god verant started to wise up and realise that they dont have to make wis and int items nearly impossible to get just because they are good items. Heck if jasarth scale leggings didn't have the 5wis part I'd probably wear these myself.

Mandicus 55 sham

__DEL__1591756381276

PS: I tank better then warriors.... just not as long *g*

Take your crescent legs and enjoy, I as a monk would rather have these than my 5ac planar armor and there is no better set of legs out there for monks. ▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2001 at 10:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757823951
18 posts
I play both a level 60 ench and a 58 Monk. If given the choise of which char I would give these to (which I likely wouldn't get) it would be the monk hands down. AC and hitpoints are primary stats for monks. Hit points are nice for my ench but AC doesn't really make much difference to me. Derekor hits for 700s with 800 AC or with 600 AC, best to just not get hit.

Symoril Thar'daan, Phantasmist
Szirax Szithisar, Master
Cerulean Stormcaste, Evoker
Mercenary Force
Innoruuk

▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 7:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965965331
52 posts
If it makes you feel better, enchanter-san, you aren't ot the first person to play a monk to 42 with you lizard head waaaay up your own *****

I always go for AC and resists (which are sorry atm) and str goes up by accident. I cannot even remember the last raid type situation when I had under 250 str. And it take me 150 str to equal the effectiveness of one kind level 60 ranger. It only takes about 30 raw AC to make up for a kind 60 cleric buff.
▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2000 at 1:48 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If you need to know, I'm level 60 and monks don't like to tank but when you wield our epic weapon and a rakusha cloak good luck getting anything to taunt off. Tell me you wouldn't sacrifice 3 int for 12ac and I'll call you a liar. Enchanters aren't tanks either but does that mean they don't take hits? And level 42 isn't nearly high enough because the desparity in monks defense cap doesn't kick in before level 50. Play a monk, then offer your advice. Don't judge our class from what you think we are.

Peace
▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2000 at 5:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750254454
21 posts
At lvl 54 I don't need to sacrifice Int for AC/HP -- got Int items coming out my rear, same with Cha items. Long as I'm 190+ in each, I don't care. Playing at lvl 51 (friend's account)I get beat down wether I'm wearing AC or Str gear so I opt for the Str gear so that at least I'm beating stuff down. If I get aggro, it's time to FD for a sec, turn off attack, whatever -- a smart player knows how to avoid aggro as a Monk (as an Enc it's Gate or die or tank until a taunt works, etc.) once it's gained.

Just cause you got CFs and Rak doesn't mean you are a tank, it just means you're doing DMG, as stated previously, Monks aren't Tanks, they're DMG Dealers
▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2000 at 6:05 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ever have a spell resisted? Well FD gets resisted a lot by high level mobs too so FD doesn't always work. And never one time did I claim to be a tank. I merely stated these pants would do more good on a monk than any other character listed for the level it comes off of so get off your high horse, level a monk to 60 then tell me how to play one.
▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2001 at 5:34 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm a 60 monk and i consider these the best monk pants in the game.

because:

15 ac
20rd
wt 2.0

Before SoV, it was a monks aspiration to wear efretti legs from the plain of sky; drawback = weight 6!, 15 ac though, so dooable, in certain situations. Now we get 2 choices: flayed paebala and oiled greaves - both substantially lighter.

Oiled greaved, argueably are better, due to str and .5 less weight. But at 60, your str DEFINATELY should hit 255 with shaman buffs, and should be pretty near 200+ anyway.

Disease Resist is one of the hardest resist to raise, thx thex dagger = non monk usable^-^.

So i will get these (been trying for days now), as will all the monks in my guild.
▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 4:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm a lvl 57 monk with epic and a CoF. I dont think that any lvl 60 warrior can taunt off me. And I dont like FDing and waiting with my atk off, as I lose a LOT of damage. if I'm a dmg dealer, why would i be spending most fights with my atk off? Why wouldn't I rather take a few hits on the lesser mobs and whup the crap outta them? whatever that chanter is smoking, I want some of it, cause it's prolly high quality all natural stuff =P
▲ Page top
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2000 at 1:55 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
im glad someone mentioned that. i have played with my friends 30th monk off and on, and even then it takes a bit of work from the tanks to get something off me. AC and STR items (followed by HP)are what i would get a monk if i was playing one. forget dex and agi, forget everything else. there really arent alot of cheap proc'ing items for monks to worry about dex, and im not sure what agi does anymore, so str/ac/hp items are left and most of those are dirt cheap.
thats just my 2cp's..hate me if you will :)

Jookar
Iksar Warrior of Cazic Thule
Tarew Marr

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 26 2000 at 9:20 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Verant is just playing favorites with Abashi (sp?) i.e. Gordan's favorite class. Necros have more robes with great stats than the other robe classes, Human and Erudite Necros have flayed skin which is better than other classes caster armor. Who cares if it makes sense that Necros can wear it because it's from the Dragon NECROPOLIS. The fact that the other robes play second fiddle to Necros is very obvious.

# Dec 18 2000 at 4:27 AM Rating: Decent

how about you just whine like babies untill verant laughs at you? wah, necros getting good stuff.
Take a look around. Can warriors wear items like a gilded cloth? or how about shamans druids or clerics using a runed cowl? I mean, their cloth type items, and I thought everyone can wear some type of cloth.
We've yet to even begun to scratch the surface of drops in kunark, let alone drops for each individual class. and you babies are already whining about a pair of pants. rofl. when does christmas break end so all of you go back to school and stop crowding the dungeons.
CAMP CHECK!! PH34R MY L33T SKILLZ! CAN I GET A SOW? PLEASE RES ME DUDE! CAN YOU PORT ME? DUDE, YOU SUCK. HEAL ME!!! HEAL ME /yell /yell /yell
